steps: Submit tax reclaim form to ABN AMRO Custody for Unilever NV (UNA) showing NL-NO treaty rate of 15% vs applied 25%
Provide Norwegian tax residency certificate to support treaty eligibility for reduced withholding
Reference NL-NO tax treaty Article 10 limiting dividend tax to 15% for qualifying Norwegian residents
Follow up with ABN AMRO within 30 days for EUR 22,193.60 reclaim processing status
